summary: Repaired the backend live adapter so snapshots prefer real read-only Hub/MCP operational reads when available and clearly mark fallback metadata when degraded. Reworked the SSE stream to poll read-only snapshots and emit stable typed incremental events for operational changes instead of only startup events and heartbeats. Branch pushed to origin.
tasks_completed: Changed /api/snapshot live source health to read Hub through the read-only MCP/Hub operational API and MCP through an HTTP operational probe, with local .scion-ops session metadata labeled as degraded fallback only.

Added content cursors and read-only snapshot diffing for /api/events so the SSE stream emits typed incremental events for round, timeline, inbox, runtime health, diagnostic, source status, stale, and fallback changes.
Added backend tests that simulate Hub/MCP operational reads and source changes, proving typed SSE incremental events are emitted without snapshot replacement semantics.
Updated the new UI evaluation docs and OpenSpec task list for the repair.
tests_run: cd new-ui-evaluation && python3 -m py_compile adapter.py tests/test_adapter.py
cd new-ui-evaluation && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests
